queries.sql: SELECT mp.product_id, mp.article_number, mp.product_name, mp.manufacturer_name, ms.ugr, ms.cri, ms.ip_rating, ms.ik_rating, ms.min_temp_c, ms.max_temp_c, ms.electrical_power_w, ms.lumen_output_max, mc.icon_tags FROM match_products mp JOIN match_specs ms ON mp.product_id = ms.product_id LEFT JOIN match_certs mc ON mp.product_id = mc.product_id WHERE mp.is_current = 1 AND ms.ugr <= 25 AND ms.cri >= 80 AND ms.ip_rating >= 20 AND ms.ik_rating >= 8 AND ms.min_temp_c <= -10 AND ms.max_temp_c >= 35;

SELECT mp.product_id, mp.article_number, mp.product_name, mp.manufacturer_name, ms.ugr, ms.cri, ms.ip_rating, ms.ik_rating, ms.min_temp_c, ms.max_temp_c, ms.electrical_power_w, ms.lumen_output_max, mc.icon_tags FROM match_products mp JOIN match_specs ms ON mp.product_id = ms.product_id LEFT JOIN match_certs mc ON mp.product_id = mc.product_id WHERE mp.is_current = 1 AND ms.ugr <= 24 AND ms.cri >= 80 AND ms.ip_rating >= 20 AND ms.ik_rating >= 8 AND ms.min_temp_c <= -5 AND ms.max_temp_c >= 30;
